data_source: trades_10d.csv — last 50 trades (all BTC, n=50). Full dataset n=965.
note: Last 50 trades in CSV are 100% BTC. SOL and HYPE data is from full 965-trade dataset only.

slippage_analysis.slippage_context: High slippage cases cluster in BTC SHORT at 71-74% confidence — consistent with 70-80% conf degradation finding.

noise_stop_analysis.noise_stop_pattern: 5/5 top noise stops are BTC SHORT in 76-79% confidence range. ATR widening fix (atr_mult_sl=1.8) pending restart (10th flag).
noise_stop_analysis.noise_stop_improvement_vs_prior: 36.4% (last50) vs 50.8% (100d backtest cache). Improvement trend but still elevated.

rr_geometry.verdict: DEEPLY_NEGATIVE — avg loss is 2.09x avg win. Need 68%+ WR to break even at this ratio.
rr_geometry.kelly_note: Full dataset Kelly barely positive (p=0.570, b=0.763). Recent-100 Kelly deeply negative. Decay confirmed.
rr_geometry.rr_fix_status: PENDING_RESTART — atr_mult_sl=1.8 A/B test proposed (10th flag)

fill_analysis.partial_fill_rate: UNKNOWN — no live order data (bot offline Day 75)

duration_bug.actual: ALL 965 trades affected (100%). Prior audit only checked 589-trade backtest slice.
duration_bug.impact: HoldTimeRuleManager ML entirely compromised. Time-of-day analysis impossible from CSV.
duration_bug.status: UNFIXED — dev required. Severity upgraded from MEDIUM to CRITICAL.

high_priority_findings: RR GEOMETRY CRITICAL: avg_loss=$306.96 vs avg_win=$147.07 (last50). Ratio=0.479. Need 68%+ WR at this ratio.
NOISE STOPS: 36.4% of SL hits are high-confidence (conf>=75%) signals — noise in SL placement, not signal quality.
SLIPPAGE PEAK: 1.84% worst case BTC SHORT. Avg 0.53%. Clustered in 70-74% confidence range.
BTC-ONLY RECENT: Last 50 trades are 100% BTC. SOL/HYPE performance metrics are all-time-only.
DURATION DATA TOTAL LOSS: 0/965 trades have valid duration (was: estimated 52/589 affected).
delta_from_last_run: MAJOR UPDATE — switched from cached backtest_100d.csv (n=589) to actual trades_10d.csv (n=965, last50). Duration bug severity upgraded from 8.8% to 100% affected. RR ratio worse than prior estimate (0.479 vs 0.91). Noise stop rate improved (36.4% vs 50.8%).
